NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIDE.title: Tide
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUITABLE_JUDGMENT.desc:
Costs 1 less for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have.
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Lose {CalculatedHpLoss:diff()} HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAST_DRACONIC_GLORIES.d: Gain 1 [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue]. Your [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue] causes you to lose [red]2[/red] additional HP and deals double damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_FINAL_JUDGMENT.title: Final Judgment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_FINAL_JUDGMENT.descript:
Exhaust.
Kill an enemy.
Bosses instead lose 50% of their current HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIVING_WATER.title: Living Water
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CONVERGING_TIDES.title: Converging Tides
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CONVERGING_TIDES.descri: Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIDES_I_HAVE_RETURNED.d:
Add {Cards:diff()} Equitable Judgment into your hand.
Gain [gold]Tides[/gold] 3.
Upgrade: The generated cards are upgraded.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RED_TIDE.title: Red Tide
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SURGING_TORRENT.title: Surging Torrent
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SURGING_TORRENT.descrip:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Gains bonus damage from each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUMMONS_TO_COURT.title: Summons to Court
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUMMONS_TO_COURT.descri:
Exhaust.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Submit[/gold] a card from your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ACCEPTING_EVIDENCE.desc:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Submit[/gold] a card from your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IRONCLAD_EVIDENCE.title: Ironclad Evidence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IRONCLAD_EVIDENCE.descr:
Exhaust.
X [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]: [gold]Submit[/gold] up to X cards from your hand.
Upgrade: Retain.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SILENCE.title: Silence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SILENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Submit[/gold] a card from your draw pile.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IN_DEPTH_INQUIRY.title: In-Depth Inquiry
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IN_DEPTH_INQUIRY.descri:
Exhaust.
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
Choose a card in your hand. Replay it that many additional times.
Upgrade: Costs 1 less.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SELF_INFLICTED.title: Self-Inflicted
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SELF_INFLICTED.descript:
Exhaust.
Deal damage equal to the target's next attack.
Multi-attacks repeat the same number of times.
Upgrade: Retain.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANE_STRIKE.title: Cane Strike
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUNISHMENT.title: Punishment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CHERISH.title: Cherish
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CHERISH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs 1 less for each [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] in your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RETRIAL.title: Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RETRIAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least 2 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold], remove 2 and apply {VulnerableAmount:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to the target. Otherwise, apply it to yourself.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TASTING.title: Water Tasting
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TASTING.descripti: At end of combat, gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DEFENSE.title: Defense
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DEFENSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Gain Vigor equal to the Block gained.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COUNTING_SINS.title: Counting Sins
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COUNTING_SINS.descripti:
Exhaust.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to an enemy.
Upgrade: Remove Exhaust.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_NO_RETRIAL.title: No Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_NO_RETRIAL.description:
Retain.
Whenever you lose HP, gain 1 Buffer and lose 1 No Retrial.
Upgrade: Costs 1 less.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AWE_INSPIRING.title: Awe Inspiring
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CLEAR_SKIES.title: Clear Skies
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CLEAR_SKIES.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Next turn, [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EVIDENCE.title: Evidence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INTERROGATION.title: Interrogation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INTERROGATION.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle an Evidence into your draw pile.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ANNOUNCE_NO_CRIME.title: Announce No Crime
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ANNOUNCE_NO_CRIME.descr:
Exhaust.
Set all creatures' HP to 50% of their Max HP.
Upgrade: Innate.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SOURCE_OF_LIFE.title: Source of Life
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SOURCE_OF_LIFE.descript:
Exhaust.
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] and gain that much Energy.
Upgrade: [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} first.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STILLED_WELL.title: Stilled Well
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STILLED_WELL.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Remove 1 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]: Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DOWNPOUR.title: Downpour
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DOWNPOUR.description:
Retain.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEGAL_AID.title: Legal Aid
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_DRAGON.title: Hydro Dragon
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_DRAGON.descriptio:
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
Add a Final Judgment into your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OBJECTION_OVERRULED.des:
Exhaust.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least {DropletsToConsume:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold], remove them and Stun the target.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PLUIE_SUR_LA_VILLE.desc:
Gain 1 Pluie Sur La Ville.
While active, gain 1 Max Energy and lose 2 HP at the start of your turn.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIN_UPON_SIN.title: Sin Upon Sin
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIN_UPON_SIN.descriptio:
Apply {SinUponSinPower:diff()} [gold]Sin Upon Sin[/gold].
Whenever the applier gains [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] this turn, apply that much Contempt of Court.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ASSIST_ARREST.title: Assist Arrest
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ASSIST_ARREST.descripti:
Gain {AssistArrestPower:diff()} Assist Arrest.
Whenever you heal, Summon that much Osty.
Upgrade: Innate.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIPHON_PRIMORDIAL_SEA.d: At the start of your turn, if you have at least {SiphonPrimordialSeaPower:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold], remove them and gain 2 Strength.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LET_THE_MIGHTY.title: Let the Mighty
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LET_THE_MIGHTY.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals double damage to Elites and quadruple damage to Bosses.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RESIST_STRICTLY.title: Resist Strictly
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RESIST_STRICTLY.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold]. If the target intends to attack, apply twice as much.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ACCUSATION.title: Accusation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ACCUSATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Agility[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ADJOURNMENT.title: Adjournment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WALK_INTO_RAIN.title: Walk into Rain
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIMELY_RAIN.title: Timely Rain
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIMELY_RAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you are at or below 50% HP, [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} and draw 1 card.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TSUNAMI.title: Tsunami
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOD_OF_LIFE.title: God of Life
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOD_OF_LIFE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
Gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
Exhaust.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEVIATHAN_FORM.title: Leviathan Form
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEVIATHAN_FORM.descript:
Gain 1 Leviathan Form.
While active, your HP is set to an effectively infinite amount.
At the start of your turn, restore your original HP, then reduce this. When it expires, reapply it.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TEARS_I_SHALL_REPAY.des:
Exhaust.
[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} twice.
Add 2 Equitable Judgment into your hand.
Upgrade: The generated cards are upgraded.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DRAGON_TREASURE.title: Dragon Treasure
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUAL_TREATMENT.title: Equal Treatment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUAL_TREATMENT.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]. Apply that much [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to ALL enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INITIAL_WARNING.title: Initial Warning
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INITIAL_WARNING.descrip:
Innate. Exhaust.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ENFORCE_EXECUTION.title: Enforce Execution
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ENFORCE_EXECUTION.descr: Remove all Block from the target. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ORIGINAL_SIN.title: Original Sin
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ORIGINAL_SIN.descriptio:
Exhaust.
Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to ALL enemies.
On turn 1, this moves to the bottom of your draw pile and auto-plays at the start of your turn if still there.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUBLIC_OPINION.title: Public Opinion
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUBLIC_OPINION.descript:
Exhaust.
This turn, whenever another player plays an Attack, gain {EdictGain:diff()} [gold]Edict[/gold]. Whenever another player plays a Skill, lose {EdictGain:diff()} [gold]Edict[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STARE_DECISIS.title: Stare Decisis
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STARE_DECISIS.descripti:
Exhaust.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Replay the first other Attack you played this combat.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TOUCHING.title: Touching
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TOUCHING.description:
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]. Draw 2 cards per droplet removed.
Upgrade: [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} first.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CORNERING.title: Cornering
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CORNERING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This combat, this costs 1 more and its damage doubles each time it is played.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAGING_FLURRY.title: Raging Flurry
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAGING_FLURRY.descripti:
Ethereal.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove 1 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]: Add a 0-cost copy of this to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_SPLASH.title: Water Splash
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_SPLASH.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Next turn, [gold]Surge[/gold] {SurgeNextTurn:diff()}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BAPTISM.title: Baptism
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_SESSION.title: Court Session
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_SESSION.descripti:
The next {CourtSessionPower:diff()} card(s) you play will be [gold]Submitted[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Upgrade: Gain 2 stacks.|}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TIGHT.title: Water Tight
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TIGHT.description: At the end of your turn, gain {WaterTightPower:diff()} Block for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EXILE.title: Exile
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EXILE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Select|Randomly} put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] at bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Gain Energy equal to its cost.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COMPENSATION.title: Compensation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COMPENSATION.descriptio:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every {IfUpgraded:show:5|6} HP you are missing from your Max HP.{InCombat:
(Gain {StrengthAmount:diff()}.)|}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SEDENE_STICKER.title: Sedene Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_KIARA_STICKER.title: Kiara Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TALOCHARD_STICKER.title: Talochard Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TALOCHARD_STICKER.descr:
Remove all Block and Artifact from an enemy.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MAMERE_STICKER.title: Mamere Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MAMERE_STICKER.descript: Add a random colorless card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_XANA_STICKER.title: Xana Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MENTHE_STICKER.title: Menthe Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MENTHE_STICKER.descript: Add a random card costing 2 or more to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_VERENATA_STICKER.title: Verenata Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAHSIV_STICKER.title: Pahsiv Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAHSIV_STICKER.descript: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards to add to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANOTILA_STICKER.title: Canotila Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANOTILA_STICKER.descri:
Choose 2 cards from your draw pile and add them to your hand.
You cannot gain this again this combat.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AEVAL_STICKER.title: Aeval Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AEVAL_STICKER.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Exhaust an Elphane Sticker in your hand to gain 10 more Block.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ELPHANE_STICKER.title: Elphane Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ELPHANE_STICKER.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Exhaust an Aeval Sticker in your hand to deal 10 more damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.title: Supporting Strike
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PARTING_GIFT.title: Parting Gift
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PARTING_GIFT.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STICKER_BOOK.title: Sticker Book
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STICKER_BOOK.descriptio:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] card to your hand.
Draw 1 card.
Upgrade: Add 2 stickers and remove Exhaust.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WARM_CURRENT.title: Warm Current
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WARM_CURRENT.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] in hand, hit 1 additional time.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_REBIRTH.title: Rebirth
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNES_WILL.title: Sigewinne's Will
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNES_WILL.descrip: Every 6 [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards you play, add a Sigewinne Sticker to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNE_STICKER.title: Sigewinne Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOOD_MORNING.title: Good Morning!
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOOD_MORNING.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add {StickerAmount:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIAL_GROUP.title: Trial Group
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIAL_GROUP.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards to your hand.
Add 1 random minion card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MEGA_MAGIC_SWORD.title: Mega Magic Sword
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MEGA_MAGIC_SWORD.descri:
Auto-play all [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards in your Exhaust pile.
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, increased for each sticker there.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RECOLLECTION.title: Recollection
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RECOLLECTION.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Choose one to transform into a random [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIVIAL_MATTERS.title: Trivial Matters
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LAMINAR_FLOW.title: Laminar Flow
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LAMINAR_FLOW.descriptio: After playing your first Attack card each turn, consume {LaminarFlowPower:diff()} (2 when upgraded) [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to play it again.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAIN_DEW_SHARE.title: Rain Dew Share
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAIN_DEW_SHARE.descript:
[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} for all players.
Upgrade: Trigger [gold]Surge[/gold] twice for each player.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ADMONITION.title: Admonition
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ADMONITION.description:
Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to an enemy.
[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}{IfUpgraded:show: twice.|.}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INDIGNATION.title: Indignation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INDIGNATION.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.{IfUpgraded:show:| Upgrade: Deal 10 more damage.}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OCEANIC_EDICT.title: Oceanic Edict
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OCEANIC_EDICT.descripti: Select {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile and add them to your hand. Consume {SourcewaterDroplet:diff()} Sourcewater Droplets to play them instead.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_SOVEREIGNTY.title: Hydro Sovereignty
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BREATH.title: Breath
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BREATH.description: Whenever you gain HP, deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIQUEFACTION.title: Liquefaction
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIQUEFACTION.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Lose ALL your Block and [gold]Surge[/gold] for that much.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_ARGUMENT.title: Court Argument
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_ARGUMENT.descript: Your [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [gold]Agility[/gold] trigger {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} extra time(s) per turn.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRAVELING_SPORE.title: Traveling Spore
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRAVELING_SPORE.descrip: At end of combat, remove this card and {Cards:diff()} other card(s) from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_THOUSAND_FINGERS_POINTI: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Hit again for every 10 [gold]Edict[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SPIDER_SILK_TRACE.title: Spider Silk Trace
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SPIDER_SILK_TRACE.descr: [gold]Submit[/gold] all Status and Curse cards in your hand, then draw that many cards. Exhaust.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RIFT_CARD.title: Rift
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RIFT_CARD.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, the All-Devouring Narwhal devours {Damage} of your Max HP and gains {Damage} Max HP.
